subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Though I have not the time to read even a single line, thy detailed letter [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه مفصل شما را با وجود آنکه بجان عزیزت فرصت قرائت یکسطر
subcodes.subjects: @constitutional revolution in Iran, @critique of Eastern values; culture, @past, present and future of Iran
